final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing WeChat public account article cover image for a fragrance new product launch campaign titled "染秋".

Style/medium: needs a high-end, premium-texture aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be center composition with the title as the dominant focal point
Subject: must include the fragrance product launch theme "染秋香氛新品发布"
Scene/backdrop: needs an autumnal atmosphere — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a refined, luxurious mood — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs an autumn-toned direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a premium, high-quality surface treatment — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" (large, primary title), "秋意染染 时光留香" (secondary subtitle)
Constraints: must preserve strong title prominence; cover dimensions are 900×500 (horizontal banner ratio)
Avoid:
